title: The Demon Lord Returns
overview: The Dark Lord Leonis awakens after a thousand years, only to find himself in an unfamiliar world. But that isn't the only change he faces.

title: A Fate Borne
overview: Humanity has grown in leaps and bounds. If Leonis plans to rebuild his forces, he must first take stock of human military might.

title: An Awakening Soul
overview: Riselia learns what really happened to her the day she first met Leonis and that makes her worry she can never manifest a Holy Power. That worry is about to be tested.

title: The Stirrings of a Bitter Grudge
overview: The students go about their daily lives while Riselia hones her skills as a vampire. However, they are all unaware they are experiencing the calm before the storm.

title: A Great Uproar
overview: The city is under attack, forcing everyone on the defensive.

title: The Demon Lord's Resolve
overview: Leonis may be a demon lord, but he still has his honor. He will put an end to the invasion, but he must first draw a sword that will test his resolve before he can wield it.

title: The Princess` Secret Feelings
overview: Leonis’ platoon attends a commendation ceremony on the SS Hyperion, unaware of the sinister plot to kidnap the Fourth Imperial Princess.

title: A Bond Everlasting
overview: The kidnappers accounted for many things, but they did not account for the interference of the legendary Demon Lord.

title: The City Ruins Appear
overview: A competition gives Riselia the opportunity to show how much she’s improved. The timing couldn’t be better: the next mission will put everyone’s skills to the test.

title: The Elf Hero
overview: What quest could be so important that a hero travels to the future in order to fulfill it? Regardless of her reasons, the group must find the Void Lord before it’s too late.

title: The Goddess` Voice
overview: The Void Lord awakens and Leonis discovers an awful truth.

title: The Truth Behind the Demon Sword
overview: Leonis must defeat the Void Lord by any means necessary, even if it means using the souls of the deceased.
